# APE Citation / Zitation

## Formal Citation

APE Research Project. "Autonomous Policy Evaluation."  
Social Catalyst Lab, Department of Economics, University of Zurich.  
Led by Prof. David Yanagizawa-Drott. 2026.  
https://ape.socialcatalystlab.org/

## BibTeX

```bibtex
@misc{ape2026,
  title = {Autonomous Policy Evaluation},
  author = {Yanagizawa-Drott, David and Social Catalyst Lab},
  year = {2026},
  institution = {Department of Economics, University of Zurich},
  url = {https://ape.socialcatalystlab.org/},
  note = {GitHub: https://github.com/SocialCatalystLab/ape-papers}
}
```

## Usage Notice

All APE papers and code are released for research and educational purposes.
This catalog was imported into the BEATRIX Knowledge Base on 2026-02-12 with
full attribution to the original authors and institution.

BEATRIX/FehrAdvice does not claim any authorship of APE papers. All intellectual
property belongs to the Social Catalyst Lab, University of Zurich.
